English | Azərbaycanca

Lesson 2 - Greetings & Introductions

Say hello and introduce yourself

Goal

Say hello and introduce yourself.

Content

1) Greetings

Hello, Hi, Goodbye

2) Introduce Yourself

My name is... / I am...

3) Ask a Name

What is your name?

Practice

Mini-dialogue

Hi, I’m Farid. Nice to meet you.

Try It Yourself

Say your name and greet another person politely.

Sentence Building

Build a self-introduction

Type your name to complete the sentence.

My name is _____.

Example: My name is Farid.

Lesson Complete

Practice these greetings aloud and use them in short conversations.

Back to Lesson 1 Next: Lesson 3 Back to A0 Course
